patches.summary: Aligned README, skill, help text, and metadata with the current postman-explore implementation.
patches.reason: The generated docs advertised unsupported sync flags and described drift as a two-snapshot diff even though the current command reports locally synced entities updated within a time window.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./... passed; go build ./cmd/postman-explore-pp-cli succeeded; --version reports 3.0.1; sync help shows Postman Explore resource examples.

patches.summary: Made the local SQLite DB path shared across CLI root flags, local read commands, doctor/workflow helpers, and MCP.
patches.reason: Previously sync/search/workflow could use one DB while novel commands and MCP silently read the default DB, making --db unreliable for agents and tests.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./... passed; live smoke confirmed top --db reads the DB populated by sync --db; POSTMAN_EXPLORE_DB works for sync and top.

patches.summary: Serialized Store write transactions to prevent SQLITE_BUSY failures during default parallel sync.
patches.reason: Default sync concurrency can run multiple resource writers against the same SQLite database; WAL does not allow concurrent writers, so one resource can fail with database is locked.
patches.validated_outcome: Fresh-head repro failed with SQLITE_BUSY; patched live smoke synced category,collection,workspace,api,flow with default concurrency: success=5 errored=0 total_records=412.
